title: laelia anceps subsp. anceps
intro: Laelia anceps subsp. anceps, also known as the 'Anceps Pansy Orchid', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Laelia anceps subsp. anceps include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and aid in the treatment of various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in traditional medicine, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
